paragraphs.text: Protect consumers agaist malicious video game end of life practices. I spend 20,-on Call of duty warzone and when they released warzone 2 which was basically the same game they took the access away from my purchase en sold the exact same digital item in the store again this time for 30,-. video games companies want customers not to own their purchased video games. Companies should not be able te revoke access of a purchased video game whenever they want. It's only fair. Companies should have a fair end of life plan for these digital products and allow the community the host their own servers when the company no longer does.
